alt_text: Calligraphic rendering of the Quranic phrase 'ليس كمثله شيء' ('There is nothing like Him') with grammatical decomposition below: 'ک + مثلہ' with red arrows pointing to 'Being' (mithl) and 'Attributes' (the ka- of comparison).
notes: Quran 42:11 — foundational tanzih (apophatic) verse. Decomposes the Arabic to show double-negation: 'not like Him', 'nothing'.
